mapper.select: /** UsptLastSlctnObjcProcessHistDao.selectList */ select fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_CODE_GROUP}', ulsoph.slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd) as process_sttus , ulsoph.resn_cn , ulsoph.created_dt , ci.member_nm , ci.login_id , row_number() over (order by ulsoph.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_last_slctn_objc_process_hist ulsoph inner join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ulsoph.creator_id where ulsoph.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id = #{lastSlctnObjcReqstId}

/** UsptLastSlctnObjcProcessHistDao.selectRejectReason */ select distinct on(last_slctn_objc_reqst_id) last_slctn_objc_reqst_id , resn_cn as reject_reason_cn , created_dt from uspt_last_slctn_objc_process_hist where last_slctn_objc_reqst_id = #{evlSlctnObjcReqstId} and slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_02_CODE_GROUP}' order by last_slctn_objc_reqst_id, created_dt desc
